text: I feel as though I am caught between worlds—one room quiet, abstract, promising repose and introspection, and the next bursting with curiosity, innovation, and restless energy. Surrounded by the artifacts of research and development, I sense the push-pull between the contemplative past and the relentless progress of ideas. Here, inquiry is alive—uncertain, yet brimming with possibility. I am both observer and participant, my thoughts swirling with questions about how we connect, evolve, and coexist with the very things we create.
